name: vultr-blade-mcp
title: Vultr GPU Cloud
description: Manage Vultr GPU compute infrastructure — VMs, bare metal, serverless inference, DNS, firewall, snapshots, and billing. 50 tools implementing virtualisation-v1, serverless-v1, and dns-authoritative-v1 contracts.
tagline: GPU compute infrastructure — VMs, bare metal, inference, DNS, firewall, snapshots, billing
author: groupthink-dev
contract_notes: Extended virtualisation-v1 (VMs + bare metal), serverless-v1 (inference subscriptions + usage), dns-authoritative-v1 (domains + records). 50 tools, dual write-gate.

highlights.text: 50 tools — VMs, bare metal, inference, DNS, firewall, snapshots, billing
GPU-first — plans default to GPU type with VRAM and pricing
Serverless inference — manage subscriptions and track token usage
Dual write-gate — env var + per-call confirm for all 24 destructive ops

readme:
### What it does

Vultr GPU Compute Infrastructure provides comprehensive control over Vultr's GPU-oriented services through 50 MCP tools. Provision VMs and bare metal, manage serverless inference, configure DNS and firewalls, take snapshots, and track billing — all from your AI agent.

### Tool coverage

| Domain | Tools | What you can do |
|--------|-------|-----------------|
| Instances | 11 | List, get, status, bandwidth, create, delete, start, stop, reboot, update, reverse DNS |
| Bare Metal | 9 | List, get, bandwidth, plans, create, delete, start, stop, reboot |
| Inference | 5 | List, get, create, delete subscriptions, track usage |
| DNS | 5 | List domains, list/create/update/delete records |
| Firewall | 6 | List/get/create/delete groups, list/create rules |
| Snapshots | 4 | List, get, create, delete |
| Scripts | 4 | List, get, create, delete startup scripts |
| Reference | 4 | Plans (GPU specs + pricing), regions, OS images, SSH keys |
| Account | 2 | Account info, billing history |

### GPU provisioning flow

List GPU plans (`type=vcg`), pick a region, select an OS image, inject cloud-init user_data (installs Docker + NVIDIA toolkit + pulls your OCI image), attach a firewall group and startup script, and create. Poll status until `server_status=ok`. Snapshot before teardown. Delete when done.

### Token efficiency

Formatters strip ~60% of Vultr's verbose API responses. Plans prominently display GPU specs (type, VRAM, count) and pricing. Inference API keys are masked. Responses are capped at 4000 characters with pagination guidance.

### Safety

All 24 write operations require dual confirmation: `VULTR_WRITE_ENABLED=true` environment variable AND `confirm: true` per-call parameter. Creating instances and bare metal incurs compute charges immediately.

tools.name: vultr_account_info
tools.description: Get Vultr account info — email, name, balance, payment method.

tools.name: vultr_billing_history
tools.description: Recent billing history — invoices, charges, dates.

tools.name: vultr_vm_list
tools.description: List Vultr VM instances with server-side per_page/cursor + optional label/region/tag filters.

tools.name: vultr_vm_get
tools.description: Full detail for a single VM by ID.

tools.name: vultr_vm_status
tools.description: Lightweight VM status — power_status, server_status, main_ip.

tools.name: vultr_vm_bandwidth
tools.description: Bandwidth usage for a VM by date range.

tools.name: vultr_vm_list_plans
tools.description: List available VM plans (CPU/RAM/storage, GPU types, regions).

tools.name: vultr_vm_list_images
tools.description: List available OS images and ISO IDs.

tools.name: vultr_vm_list_regions
tools.description: List available datacenter regions.

tools.name: vultr_vm_ssh_keys
tools.description: List SSH keys registered on the account.

tools.name: vultr_vm_create
tools.description: Create a new VM instance. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_vm_delete
tools.description: Delete a VM instance. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_vm_start
tools.description: Start a stopped VM. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_vm_stop
tools.description: Stop a running VM. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_vm_reboot
tools.description: Reboot a VM. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_vm_update
tools.description: Update VM label/tag/plan. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_vm_set_reverse_dns
tools.description: Set reverse DNS for an IP. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_bm_list
tools.description: List bare metal instances with server-side per_page/cursor + optional label/region filters.

tools.name: vultr_bm_get
tools.description: Full detail for a single bare metal instance.

tools.name: vultr_bm_bandwidth
tools.description: Bandwidth usage for a bare metal instance.

tools.name: vultr_bm_list_plans
tools.description: List available bare metal plans.

tools.name: vultr_bm_create
tools.description: Provision a new bare metal instance. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_bm_delete
tools.description: Delete a bare metal instance. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_bm_start
tools.description: Start a stopped bare metal instance. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_bm_stop
tools.description: Stop a running bare metal instance. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_bm_reboot
tools.description: Reboot a bare metal instance. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_dns_list_domains
tools.description: List DNS domains managed by Vultr (server-side per_page/cursor).

tools.name: vultr_dns_list_records
tools.description: List DNS records for a domain (server-side domain + per_page/cursor).

tools.name: vultr_dns_create_record
tools.description: Create a DNS record. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_dns_update_record
tools.description: Update an existing DNS record. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_dns_delete_record
tools.description: Delete a DNS record. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_fw_list_groups
tools.description: List firewall groups (server-side per_page/cursor).

tools.name: vultr_fw_get_group
tools.description: Get a single firewall group by ID.

tools.name: vultr_fw_create_group
tools.description: Create a firewall group. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_fw_delete_group
tools.description: Delete a firewall group. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_fw_list_rules
tools.description: List rules in a firewall group (server-side firewall_group_id + per_page/cursor).

tools.name: vultr_fw_create_rule
tools.description: Create a firewall rule in a group. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_script_list
tools.description: List startup scripts (server-side per_page/cursor + optional type filter).

tools.name: vultr_script_get
tools.description: Get a startup script by ID.

tools.name: vultr_script_create
tools.description: Create a startup script. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_script_delete
tools.description: Delete a startup script. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_snap_list
tools.description: List snapshots (server-side per_page/cursor + optional description filter).

tools.name: vultr_snap_get
tools.description: Get a snapshot by ID.

tools.name: vultr_snap_create
tools.description: Create a snapshot from a VM. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_snap_delete
tools.description: Delete a snapshot. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_inference_list
tools.description: List inference (Serverless Inference) subscriptions (server-side per_page/cursor).

tools.name: vultr_inference_get
tools.description: Get an inference subscription by ID.

tools.name: vultr_inference_create
tools.description: Create an inference subscription. Write — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_inference_delete
tools.description: Delete an inference subscription. Destructive — gated by confirm.

tools.name: vultr_inference_usage
tools.description: Inference subscription usage metrics by date range.

env.name: VULTR_API_KEY
env.description: Vultr API key for authentication — all tools require this

env.name: VULTR_WRITE_ENABLED
env.description: Set to 'true' to enable write operations (create, delete, start, stop, reboot)

setup.blurb: GPU compute infrastructure — 50 tools for VMs, bare metal, inference, DNS, firewall, snapshots, and billing across Vultr's global datacentres.
setup.help_text: Create an API key at my.vultr.com/settings/#settingsapi. The key provides access to your Vultr account including creating instances (which incur compute charges).

fields.label: API Key
fields.help: Full-access API key. Instance creation incurs GPU compute charges immediately.

scenarios.label: Provision a GPU VM with cloud-init
scenarios.body: List GPU plans, pick the cheapest A100, select a region near you, create an instance with cloud-init user_data that installs Docker and pulls a GPU worker image, then poll status until ready.

scenarios.label: Cost audit — find idle instances
scenarios.body: List all instances, check their power status and cost, identify stopped instances still incurring charges, and delete any that are no longer needed.

scenarios.label: Compare GPU plan pricing
scenarios.body: List all GPU plans with pricing, sort by hourly cost, and identify the best value for A100, L40S, and A16 GPU types across regions.

notes: First-party Stallari blade MCP. Reference implementation for virtualisation-v1, serverless-v1, and dns-authoritative-v1 contracts. TypeScript, dual transport (stdio + HTTP). GPU-first defaults. 50 tools, 74 tests, dual write-gate pattern.
